info.description: Enphase Energy, Inc. is a global energy technology company, which engages in the business of designing, developing, manufacturing, and selling home energy solutions that manage energy generation, energy storage, control, and communications on one intelligent platform. It operates through the following geographical segments: the United States, the Netherlands, and Others. The company was founded by Raghuveer R. Belur and Martin Fornage in March 2006 and is headquartered in Fremont, CA.
info.description_zh: Enphase Energy, Inc.是一家全球能源技術公司，從事設計、開發、製造和銷售家庭能源解決方案的業務，這些解決方案在一個智慧平台上管理能源產生、能源儲存、控制和通訊。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：美國、荷蘭和其他地區。該公司由 Raghuveer R. Belur 和 Martin Fornage 於 2006 年 3 月創立，總部位於加州弗里蒙特。

info.description: Corvex, Inc. is an AI cloud computing company, which specializes in GPU-accelerated infrastructure for AI workloads. Its products include GPU Clusters, Confidential Computing, Inference as a Service and GPU Node. The firm offers solutions include AI model builders, enterprises, federal and sovereign solutions. The company was founded by Seth Mitchell Demsey, Jay Crystal on October 21, 2024 and is headquartered in Arlington, VA.
info.description_zh: Corvex, Inc. 是一家人工智慧雲端運算公司，專門為人工智慧工作負載提供 GPU 加速基礎架構。其產品包括GPU叢集、機密運算、推理即服務和GPU節點。該公司提供的解決方案包括人工智慧模型建構器、企業、聯邦和主權解決方案。該公司由 Seth Mitchell Demsey、Jay Crystal 於 2024 年 10 月 21 日創立，總部位於維吉尼亞州阿靈頓。

info.description: Personalis, Inc. engages in the provision of advanced genomic tests for cancer. The firm is also involved in providing sequencing and data analysis services to support population sequencing initiatives. The company was founded by Euan A. Ashley, Michael Snyder, Atul J. Butte, John S. West, and Russ B. Altman in February 2011 and is headquartered in Fremont, CA.
info.description_zh: Personalis, Inc. 致力於提供先進的癌症基因組測試。該公司還提供定序和數據分析服務，以支援群體定序計劃。該公司由 Euan A. Ashley、Michael Snyder、Atul J. Butte、John S. West 和 Russ B. Altman 於 2011 年 2 月創立，總部位於加州弗里蒙特。

info.description: CytoMed Therapeutics Ltd. is a biopharmaceutical company, which engages in the business of innate immune cell-based immunotherapy, pluripotent stem cell-based therapy, and undertaking the research and development of immune cell and stem cell-based therapy. It operates through the Malaysia and Singapore geographical segments. The company was founded by Chee Kong Choo on March 9, 2018 and is headquartered in Singapore.
info.description_zh: CytoMed Therapeutics Ltd.是一家生物製藥公司，從事天然免疫細胞免疫療法、多能幹細胞療法業務，並承擔免疫細胞和幹細胞療法的研發。它透過馬來西亞和新加坡地理部門運作。該公司由Chee Kong Choo於2018年3月9日創立，總部位於新加坡。

info.description: SolarEdge Technologies, Inc. engages in the development of energy technology, which provides inverter solutions. The firm operates through the following segments: Solar and All Other. The Solar segment includes the design, development, manufacturing, and sales of an inverter solution designed to maximize power generation. The All Other segment includes the design, development, manufacturing and sales of UPS products, energy storage products, e-Mobility products, and automated machines. Its products and services include photovoltaic inverters, power optimizers, photovoltaic monitoring, software tools, and electric vehicle chargers. The company was founded by Guy Sella, Lior Handelsman, Yoav Galin, Meir Adest, and Amir Fishelov on August 7, 2006 and is headquartered in Herzliya, Israel.
info.description_zh: SolarEdge Technologies, Inc. 從事能源技術開發，提供逆變器解決方案。該公司透過以下部門運作：太陽能部門和所有其他部門。太陽能部門包括旨在最大限度提高發電量的逆變器解決方案的設計、開發、製造和銷售。所有其他部門包括 UPS 產品、儲能產品、電動交通產品和自動化機器的設計、開發、製造和銷售。其產品和服務包括光伏逆變器、功率優化器、光伏監控、軟體工具和電動車充電器。該公司由 Guy Sella、Lior Handelsman、Yoav Galin、Meir Adest 和 Amir Fishelov 於 2006 年 8 月 7 日創立，總部位於以色列荷茲利亞。

info.description: DexCom, Inc. is a medical device company, which engages in the design, development, and commercialization of glucose monitoring systems for ambulatory use by people with diabetes. Its products include Dexcom G6, Dexcom G7, Dexcom Stelo, Dexcom Share, Dexcom Real-Time API, and Dexcom ONE. The company was founded by John F. Burd on May 13, 1999 and is headquartered in San Diego, CA.
info.description_zh: DexCom, Inc. 是一家醫療器材公司，致力於供糖尿病患者門診使用的血糖監測系統的設計、開發和商業化。其產品包括Dexcom G6、Dexcom G7、Dexcom Stelo、Dexcom Share、Dexcom Real-Time API和Dexcom ONE。該公司由 John F. Burd 於 1999 年 5 月 13 日創立，總部位於加利福尼亞州聖地亞哥。

info.description: Leverage Shares 2X Long Cost Daily ETF seeks daily levered investment results, before fees and expenses, of two times (200%) of the daily percentage change in the price of the common stock of COST. The fund is an actively managed ETF. The fund invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus borrowings for investment purposes) in financial instruments with economic characteristics that, in combination, provide 200% daily leveraged exposure to the price of COST, consistent with the fund's investment objective. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 槓桿股票 2 倍長期成本每日 ETF 尋求每日槓桿投資結果（未計費用和開支）為 COST 普通股價格每日百分比變化的兩倍 (200%)。該基金是主動式管理ETF。該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上投資目的借款）投資於具有經濟特徵的金融工具，這些金融工具組合起來可提供 200% 的 COST 價格每日槓桿敞口，與基金的投資目標一致。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: HighPeak Energy, Inc. is an independent oil and natural gas company, which engages in the acquisition, development and production of oil, natural gas and NGL reserves. The company's assets are primarily located in the Howard County area of the Midland Basin. The company was founded on October 29, 2019 and is headquartered in Fort Worth, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣勘探與生產
info.description_zh: HighPeak Energy, Inc.是一家獨立的石油和天然氣公司，從事石油、天然氣和液化天然氣儲量的收購、開發和生產。該公司的資產主要位於米德蘭盆地的霍華德縣地區。該公司成立於2019年10月29日，總部位於德克薩斯州沃斯堡。

info.description: NextNav, Inc. engages in development of positioning, navigation, and timing solutions. Its products include NextNav Pinnacle, NextNav 3D, and NextNav TerraPoiNT. The company was founded by Ganesh Pattabiraman and Arun Raghupathy in May 2021 and is headquartered in Reston, VA.
info.description_zh: NextNav, Inc. 從事定位、導航和授時解決方案的開發。其產品包括 NextNav Pinnacle、NextNav 3D 和 NextNav TerraPoiNT。該公司由 Ganesh Pattabiraman 和 Arun Raghupathy 於 2021 年 5 月創立，總部位於維吉尼亞州雷斯頓。

info.description: Fair Isaac Corp. engages in the provision of decision management solutions. It operates through the Software and Scores segments. The Software segment includes pre-configured analytic and decision management solutions designed for a specific type of business need or process. The Scores segment focuses on business-to-business scoring solutions and services, business-to-consumer scoring solutions and services including myFICO solutions for consumers and associated professional services. The company was founded by Bill Fair and Earl Isaac in 1956 and is headquartered in San Jose, CA.
info.description_zh: Fair Isaac Corp. 從事提供決策管理解決方案。它透過軟體和分數部門運作。軟體部分包括專為特定類型的業務需求或流程而設計的預先配置分析和決策管理解決方案。 Scores 部門專注於企業對企業評分解決方案和服務、企業對消費者評分解決方案和服務，包括面向消費者的 myFICO 解決方案和相關專業服務。該公司由 Bill Fair 和 Earl Isaac 於 1956 年創立，總部位於加州聖荷西。

info.description: Costco Wholesale Corp. engages in the provision of operation of membership warehouses through wholly owned subsidiaries. It operates through the following geographical segments: United States, Canada, and Other International Operations. The company was founded by James D. Sinegal and Jeffrey H. Brotman in 1983 and is headquartered in Issaquah, WA.
info.description_zh: Costco Wholesale Corp.透過全資子公司從事會員倉庫經營業務。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：美國、加拿大和其他國際業務。該公司由 James D. Sinegal 和 Jeffrey H. Brotman 於 1983 年創立，總部位於華盛頓州伊瑟闊。

info.description: EchoStar Corp. engages in the design, development, and distribution of digital set-top boxes and products for direct-to-home satellite service providers. It operates through the following business segments: Pay-TV, Retail Wireless, and Broadband and Satellite Services. The Pay-TV segment business strategy is to be the best provider of video services in the United States by providing products with the best technology, outstanding customer service, and great value. The Retail Wireless segment offers Retail Wireless services as well as a competitive portfolio of wireless devices. The Broadband and Satellite Services segment business strategy is to maintain and improve leadership position and competitive advantage through development of technologies and services marketed to selected sectors within the consumer, enterprise and government markets globally. The company was founded by Charlie William Ergen, Candy Ergen, and James DeFranco in 1980 and is headquartered in Englewood, CO.
info.description_zh: EchoStar Corp. 為直接到戶衛星服務供應商設計、開發和分銷數位機上盒和產品。它透過以下業務部門運作：付費電視、零售無線以及寬頻和衛星服務。付費電視部門的業務策略是透過提供具有最佳技術、出色的客戶服務和巨大價值的產品，成為美國最好的視訊服務供應商。零售無線部門提供零售無線服務以及具競爭力的無線設備組合。寬頻和衛星服務部門的商業策略是透過開發向全球消費者、企業和政府市場中選定部門銷售的技術和服務來維持和提高領導地位和競爭優勢。該公司由 Charlie William Ergen、Candy Ergen 和 James DeFranco 於 1980 年創立，總部位於科羅拉多州恩格爾伍德。

info.description: Aveanna Healthcare Holdings, Inc. engages in providing home care services to patients. It operates through the following business segments: Private Duty Services (PDS), Home Health & Hospice (HHH), and Medical Solutions (MS). The PDS segment includes private duty nursing services. The HHH segment provides home health, hospice, and program services to predominately elderly populations. The MS segment offers supplies to patients requiring enteral nutrition services or respiratory care. The company was founded on November 30, 2016 and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.
info.description_zh: Aveanna Healthcare Holdings, Inc. 致力於為患者提供家庭護理服務。該公司透過以下業務部門運作：私人值班服務 (PDS)、家庭健康和臨終關懷 (HHH) 以及醫療解決方案 (MS)。 PDS 部門包括私人護理服務。 HHH 部門主要為老年人提供家庭健康、臨終關懷和計畫服務。 MS 部門為需要腸內營養服務或呼吸照護的患者提供用品。該公司成立於2016年11月30日，總部位於喬治亞州亞特蘭大。

info.description: AST Spacemobile, Inc. engages in building a broadband cellular network in space to operate directly with standard, unmodified mobile devices based on an extensive IP and patent portfolio. It focuses on providing mobile broadband services with global coverage to all end-users, without the need to purchase special equipment. The company was founded by Abel Avellan on May 31, 2017 and is headquartered in Midland, TX.
info.description_zh: AST Spacemobile, Inc. 致力於在太空中建立寬頻蜂窩網絡，以便直接使用基於廣泛的 IP 和專利組合的標準、未經修改的行動裝置進行操作。它專注於向所有最終用戶提供覆蓋全球的行動寬頻服務，而無需購買特殊設備。該公司由 Abel Avellan 於 2017 年 5 月 31 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州米德蘭。

info.description: Stryker Corp. is a medical technology company, which engages in the provision of products and services that help improve patient and healthcare outcomes. It operates under the MedSurg and Neurotechnology, and Orthopaedics and Spine segments. The MedSurg and Neurotechnology segment includes surgical equipment and navigation systems, endoscopic and communications systems, patient handling, emergency medical equipment, intensive care disposable products, clinical communication, workflow solutions, products for the treatment of acute ischemic and hemorrhagic stroke, traditional brain, and open skull based surgical procedures, orthobiologic, and biosurgery. The Orthopaedics and Spine segment focuses on implants used in hip and knee joint replacements and trauma and extremity surgeries, and cervical, thoracolumbar, and interbody systems used in spinal injury, deformity, and degenerative therapies. The company was founded by Homer H. Stryker in 1941 and is headquartered in Portage, MI.
info.description_zh: Stryker Corp. 是一家醫療技術公司，致力於提供有助於改善患者和醫療保健結果的產品和服務。它在醫療外科和神經技術以及骨科和脊椎部門下運作。醫療外科和神經技術部門包括手術設備和導航系統、內視鏡和通訊系統、病患處理、緊急醫療設備、重症監護一次性產品、臨床通訊、工作流程解決方案、用於治療急性缺血性和出血性中風的產品、傳統腦部和開放式顱骨外科手術、骨科生物學和生物外科。骨科和脊椎部門專注於髖關節和膝關節置換術以及創傷和四肢手術中使用的植入物，以及用於脊椎損傷、畸形和退化性治療的頸椎、胸腰椎和椎間系統。該公司由 Homer H. Stryker 於 1941 年創立，總部位於密西根州波蒂奇。

info.description: Kolibri Global Energy, Inc. is an international energy company, which focuses on finding and exploiting energy projects in oil, gas, and clean energy. It operates through the United States, and Canada and Other geographical segments. The company was founded on May 26, 2008 and is headquartered in Newbury Park, CA.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣勘探與生產
info.description_zh: Kolibri Global Energy, Inc.是一家國際能源公司，專注於尋找和開發石油、天然氣和清潔能源領域的能源專案。它透過美國、加拿大和其他地理部門開展業務。該公司成立於2008年5月26日，總部位於加州紐伯里公園。

info.description: SI-BONE, Inc. is a medical device company, which engages in the provision of a proprietary minimally invasive surgical implant system to fuse the sacroiliac joint for treatment of musculoskeletal disorders of the sacropelvic anatomy. It offers a proprietary minimally invasive surgical implant system, called iFuse, used to fuse the sacroiliac joint to treat sacroiliac joint dysfunction that often causes severe lower back pain. The company was founded by Mark A. Reiley and Jeffrey W. Dunn on March 18, 2008 and is headquartered in Santa Clara, CA.
info.description_zh: SI-BONE, Inc. 是一家醫療器材公司，致力於提供專有的微創手術植入系統來融合骶髂關節，以治療骶骨盆解剖結構的肌肉骨骼疾病。它提供了一種專有的微創手術植入系統，稱為 iFuse，用於融合骶髂關節，以治療經常導致嚴重下背痛的骶髂關節功能障礙。該公司由 Mark A. Reiley 和 Jeffrey W. Dunn 於 2008 年 3 月 18 日創立，總部位於加州聖克拉拉。

info.description: SuperX AI Technology Ltd. engages in providing artificial intelligence infrastructure solutions. It offers integrated systems that include computation, model hosting, data pipelines, and orchestration tools to facilitate enterprise AI deployment on a global scale. The company was founded on August 25, 2021, and is headquartered in Singapore.
info.description_zh: SuperX AI Technology Ltd. 致力於提供人工智慧基礎設施解決方案。它提供包括運算、模型託管、資料管道和編排工具的整合系統，以促進全球範圍內的企業人工智慧部署。該公司成立於2021年8月25日，總部位於新加坡。

info.description: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. engages in the provision of space for lease. It offers properties for rent to life science, agriculture technology (agtech), and technology tenants. The company was founded by Alan D. Gold, Gary A. Kreitzer, Joel S. Marcus, and Jerry M. Sudarsky in October 1994 and is headquartered in Pasadena, CA.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 辦公室
info.description_zh: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. 從事提供租賃空間的業務。它為生命科學、農業技術 (agtech) 和技術租戶提供出租物業。該公司由 Alan D. Gold、Gary A. Kreitzer、Joel S. Marcus 和 Jerry M. Sudarsky 於 1994 年 10 月創立，總部位於加州帕薩迪納。

info.description: Caesarstone Ltd. operates as a multi material designer, producer and reseller of countertops used in residential and commercial buildings globally. It designs, develops, produces and source engineered quartz, natural stone and porcelain products that offer aesthetic appeal and functionality through a distinct variety of colors, styles, textures, and finishes used primarily as countertops, vanities, and other interior and exterior spaces. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Haifa, Israel.
info.description_zh: Caesarstone Ltd. 是一家多材料設計商、生產商和經銷商，產品用於全球住宅和商業建築的檯面。它設計、開發、生產和採購工程石英、天然石材和瓷器產品，這些產品透過獨特的各種顏色、款式、紋理和飾面提供美學吸引力和功能性，主要用作檯面、梳妝台和其他內部和外部空間。該公司成立於1987年，總部位於以色列海法。

info.description: DocuSign, Inc. engages in the provision of cloud-based electronic signature solutions, which helps companies and individuals securely collect information, automate data workflows, and sign anything. The firm automates manual and paper-based processes allowing users to manage all aspects of documented business transactions including identity management, authentication, digital signature, forms and data collection, collaboration, workflow automation, and storage. Its products include eSignature, CLM, Gen for Salesforce, Document Generation, Standards-Based Signatures, Notary and Web Forms. The company was founded by Thomas H. Gonser and Court Lorenzini in 2003 and is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: DocuSign, Inc. 致力於提供基於雲端的電子簽名解決方案，幫助公司和個人安全地收集資訊、自動化資料工作流程以及簽署任何內容。該公司實現手動和紙本流程的自動化，允許用戶管理記錄業務交易的各個方面，包括身分管理、身份驗證、數位簽章、表格和資料收集、協作、工作流程自動化和儲存。其產品包括電子簽章、CLM、Gen for Salesforce、文件產生、基於標準的簽章、Notary 和 Web 表單。該公司由 Thomas H. Gonser 和 Court Lorenzini 於 2003 年創立，總部位於加州舊金山。

info.description: Paychex, Inc. engages in the provision of human capital management solutions for payroll, human resources, insurance, and retirement for small and medium-sized businesses. Its solutions include payroll services, hiring services, business insurance, time and attendance, employee benefits, finance and payments, human resources services, and startup services. The company was founded by Blase Thomas Golisano in 1971 and is headquartered in Rochester, NY.
info.description_zh: Paychex, Inc. 致力於為中小型企業提供薪資、人力資源、保險和退休方面的人力資本管理解決方案。其解決方案包括薪資服務、招聘服務、商業保險、考勤、員工福利、財務和支付、人力資源服務和創業服務。該公司由 Blase Thomas Golisano 於 1971 年創立，總部位於紐約州羅徹斯特。

info.description: Weyco Group, Inc. engages in the designing, marketing, and distribution of footwear for men, women, and children. It operates through the following segments: North American Wholesale and North American Retail. The North American Wholesale segment includes selling products to department stores and specialty shops in the United States and Canada. The North American Retail segment operates online shops and company-owned stores in cities. The company was founded in 1892 and is headquartered in Glendale, WI.
info.description_zh: Weyco Group, Inc. 從事男士、女士和兒童鞋類的設計、行銷和分銷。它透過以下部門運作：北美批發和北美零售。北美批發部門包括向美國和加拿大的百貨公司和專賣店銷售產品。北美零售部門在城市經營網路商店和公司自營商店。該公司成立於 1892 年，總部位於威斯康辛州格倫代爾。

info.description: FRP Holdings, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of real estate business. It operates through the following segments: Multifamily, Industrial and Commercial, Mining Royalty Lands and Development. The Multifamily segment includes six stabilized joint ventures which own and manage apartment buildings and any associated retail. The Industrial and Commercial segment owns, leases and manages commercial properties. The Mining Royalty Lands segment owns several properties consisting of approximately 16,640 acres currently under lease for mining rents or royalties. The Development segment owns and monitors several parcels of land that are in various stages of development. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Jacksonville, FL.
info.description_zh: FRP Holdings, Inc.是一家控股公司，從事提供房地產業務。它透過以下部門運作：多戶型、工業和商業、礦業特許權土地和開發部門。多戶住宅部門包括六家穩定的合資企業，它們擁有並管理公寓大樓和任何相關零售。工業和商業部門擁有、租賃和管理商業房地產。採礦權土地部門擁有多處物業，包括約 16,640 英畝的土地，目前正以採礦租金或特許權使用費出租。開發部門擁有並管理幾塊處於不同開發階段的土地。該公司成立於 1986 年，總部位於佛羅裡達州傑克遜維爾。

info.description: VanEck Healthcare TruSector ETF is an actively managed exchange-traded fund designed to provide uncapped, pure-play exposure to the U.S. healthcare sector by overcoming traditional diversification limits that often cap the weight of the largest industry leaders. The fund employs a "TruSector" hybrid structural approach, combining direct equity investments with targeted sector ETFs to ensure the portfolio's weights accurately reflect the true market-capitalization hierarchy of the healthcare industry, including its most dominant mega-cap constituents.
info.description_zh: VanEck Healthcare TruSector ETF 是一檔主動管理的交易所交易基金，旨在透過克服傳統的多元化限制（通常會限制最大產業領導者的權重），為美國醫療保健產業提供無上限的純投資曝險。該基金採用「TruSector」混合結構方法，將直接股權投資與目標產業 ETF 結合，以確保投資組合的權重準確反映醫療保健產業的真實市值等級，包括其最具主導地位的大股成分股。

info.description: Mama's Creations, Inc. engages in the marketing, manufacturing, and distribution of fresh deli-prepared foods. The firm's products include beef meatballs, turkey meatballs, stuffed meatballs, lasagna roll ups, retail ready meals, bulk deli, single-size pasta bowls, and packaged refrigerated products. Its brands include MamaMancini's, Crown 1, Creative Salads, and The Olive Branch. The company was founded by Daniel Dougherty and Daniel Mancini on July 22, 2009 and is headquartered in East Rutherford, NJ.
info.description_zh: Mama's Creations, Inc. 從事新鮮熟食食品的營銷、製造和分銷。該公司的產品包括牛肉丸、火雞肉丸、釀肉丸、烤寬麵條捲、零售即食食品、散裝熟食店、單一尺寸義大利麵碗和包裝冷藏產品。其品牌包括 MamaMancini's、Crown 1、Creative Salads 和 The Olive Branch。該公司由 Daniel Dougherty 和 Daniel Mancini 於 2009 年 7 月 22 日創立，總部位於新澤西州東盧瑟福。

info.description: Tailwind 2.0 Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company. The company was founded on May 29, 2025 and is headquartered in Greenwich, CT.
info.description_zh: Tailwind 2.0 Acquisition Corp. 是一家空白支票公司。該公司成立於2025年5月29日，總部位於康乃狄克州格林威治。

info.description: C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. engages in the provision of freight transportation services and logistics solutions. It operates through the following segments: North American Surface Transportation (NAST), Global Forwarding, and All Other and Corporate. The NAST segment provides freight transportation services across North America through a network of offices in the United States, Canada, and Mexico. The Global Forwarding segment focuses on the global logistics services through an international network of offices in North America, Europe, Asia, Australia, New Zealand, and South America. The All Other and Corporate segment includes Robinson Fresh and Managed Services segments, as well as other surface transportation outside of North America and other miscellaneous revenues and unallocated corporate expenses. The company was founded by Charles Henry Robinson in 1905 and is headquartered in Eden Prairie, MN.
info.description_zh: C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. 從事提供貨運服務和物流解決方案。該公司透過以下部門運營：北美地面運輸部門 (NAST)、全球貨運部門以及所有其他部門和企業部門。 NAST 部門透過位於美國、加拿大和墨西哥的辦事處網路提供橫跨北美的貨運服務。全球貨運部門專注於透過北美、歐洲、亞洲、澳洲、紐西蘭和南美辦事處的國際網路提供全球物流服務。所有其他和企业部门包括 Robinson Fresh 和管理服务部门，以及北美以外的其他地面运输以及其他杂项收入和未分配的公司支出。該公司由 Charles Henry Robinson 於 1905 年創立，總部位於明尼蘇達州伊甸草原。

info.description: The TJX Cos., Inc. engages in the retail of apparel and home fashion products. It operates through the following business segments: Marmaxx, HomeGoods, TJX Canada, and TJX International. The Marmaxx segment sells family apparel including apparel, home fashions, and other merchandise. The HomeGoods segment offers an assortment of home fashions, including furniture, rugs, lighting, soft home, decorative accessories, tabletop and cookware as well as expanded pet, kids, and gourmet food departments. The TJX Canada segment operates the Winners, Marshalls, and HomeSense chains in Canada. The TJX International segment includes operations of T.K. Maxx and Homesense chains in Europe and the T.K. Maxx chain in Australia. The company was founded by Bernard Cammarata in 1962 and is headquartered in Framingham, MA.
info.description_zh: TJX Cos., Inc. 從事服裝和家居時尚產品的零售。該公司透過以下業務部門營運：Marmaxx、HomeGoods、TJX Canada 和 TJX International。 Marmaxx 部門銷售家庭服裝，包括服裝、家居時裝和其他商品。家居用品部門提供各種家居時尚產品，包括家具、地毯、照明、軟家居、裝飾配件、桌面和炊具以及擴展的寵物、兒童和美食部門。 TJX 加拿大部門在加拿大經營 Winners、Marshalls 和 HomeSense 連鎖店。 TJX International 部門包括 T.K.歐洲的 Maxx 和 Homesense 連鎖店以及 T.K.澳洲 Maxx 連鎖店。該公司由 Bernard Cammarata 於 1962 年創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州弗雷明漢。

info.description: Leverage Shares 2X Long ARM Daily ETF seeks daily levered investment results, before fees and expenses, of two times (200%) of the daily percentage change in the price of ARM. The fund is an actively managed ETF. It invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus borrowings for investment purposes) in financial instruments with economic characteristics that, in combination, provide 200% daily leveraged exposure to the price of ARM, consistent with the fund's investment objective. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 槓桿股票 2 倍多頭 ARM 每日 ETF 尋求每日槓桿投資結果（未計費用和開支）為 ARM 價格每日百分比變化的兩倍 (200%)。該基金是主動式管理ETF。它將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上用於投資目的的借款）投資於具有經濟特徵的金融工具，這些金融工具組合起來可提供 ARM 價格的 200% 每日槓桿敞口，這與基金的投資目標一致。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Central Plains Bancshares, Inc. engages in the offering of sale of shares of its common stock in connection with the conversion of Home Federal Savings from a mutual savings association to a stock savings association. The company was founded on June 13, 2023 and is headquartered in Grand Island, NE.
info.description_zh: Central Plains Bancshares, Inc. 從事與 Home Federal Savings 從互助儲蓄協會轉變為股票儲蓄協會有關的普通股股份發售。該公司成立於2023年6月13日，總部位於內布拉斯加州格蘭德島。

info.description: Standard BioTools Inc. engages in the provision of biotechnology tools and services for clinical research. It sells preparatory and analytical instruments for mass cytometry, polymerase chain reaction, library prep, single cell genomics, and consumables including integrated fluidic circuits (IFCs), assays, and reagents. The company was founded by Stephen D. Quake and Gajus Vincent Worthington on May 19, 1999 and is headquartered in Boston, MA.
info.description_zh: Standard BioTools Inc. 致力於為臨床研究提供生物技術工具和服務。該公司銷售用於質譜流式分析、聚合酶鍊式反應、文庫製備、單細胞基因組學的製備和分析儀器，以及包括整合流體迴路 (IFC)、測定和試劑在內的消耗品。該公司由 Stephen D. Quake 和 Gajus Vincent Worthington 於 1999 年 5 月 19 日創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州波士頓。

info.description: LaFayette Acquisition Corp. operates as a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of identifying, evaluating and similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on June 7, 2024 and is headquartered in Paris, France.
info.description_zh: LaFayette Acquisition Corp. 作為一家空白支票公司運作。它的成立是為了識別、評估一個或多個企業以及進行類似的企業合併。該公司成立於2024年6月7日，總部位於法國巴黎。

info.description: Landstar System, Inc. engages in the provision of transportation management solutions. It operates through the following segments: Transportation Logistics and Insurance. The Transportation Logistics segment offers transportation services including truckload and less-than-truckload transportation, rail intermodal, air and ocean cargo, project cargo, and customs brokerage. The Insurance segment includes risk and claims management services. The company was founded in January 1991 and is headquartered in Jacksonville, FL.
info.description_zh: Landstar System, Inc. 從事提供運輸管理解決方案。它透過以下部門運作：運輸物流和保險部門。運輸物流部門提供運輸服務，包括整車和零擔運輸、鐵路聯運、空運和海運、專案貨物和報關服務。保險部門包括風險和索賠管理服務。該公司成立於 1991 年 1 月，總部位於佛羅裡達州傑克遜維爾。

info.description: Newbridge Acquisition Ltd. is a blank check company. It was created for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, recapitalization, reorganization or similar business combination. The company was founded on April 16, 2021 and is headquartered in Hong Kong.
info.description_zh: Newbridge Acquisition Ltd. 是一家空白支票公司。它的創建目的是實現合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、資本重組、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2021年4月16日，總部位於香港。

info.description: OPKO Health, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical and diagnostics company, which engages in the provision of healthcare services. It operates through the Diagnostics and Pharmaceuticals segments. The Diagnostics segment manages the clinical laboratory operations of BioReference, as well as point-of-care operations. The Pharmaceuticals segment includes pharmaceutical operations in Chile, Mexico, Ireland, Israel, and Spain and pharmaceutical research and development operations. The company was founded in October 1991 and is headquartered in Miami, FL.
info.description_zh: OPKO Health, Inc.是一家生物製藥和診斷公司，提供醫療保健服務。它透過診斷和製藥部門運作。診斷部門管理 BioReference 的臨床實驗室運作以及護理點運作。製藥部門包括在智利、墨西哥、愛爾蘭、以色列和西班牙的製藥業務以及藥品研發業務。該公司成立於 1991 年 10 月，總部位於佛羅裡達州邁阿密。

info.description: Soren Acquisition Corp. operates as a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on September 2, 2025 and is headquartered in Miami, FL.
info.description_zh: Soren Acquisition Corp. 作為一家空白支票公司運作。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股本交換、資產收購、股票購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2025年9月2日，總部位於佛羅裡達州邁阿密。

info.description: Sunrise Realty Trust, Inc. engages in providing capital solutions to commercial real estate markets. It focuses on assets such as multifamily, for-sale condominiums, industrial, retail, office, hospitality, and select specialty-use. The company was founded by Leonard Mark Tannenbaum on August 28, 2023 and is headquartered in West Palm Beach, FL.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 抵押貸款
info.description_zh: Sunrise Realty Trust, Inc. 致力於為商業房地產市場提供資本解決方案。它專注於多戶住宅、待售公寓、工業、零售、辦公、酒店和精選專業用途等資產。該公司由 Leonard Mark Tannenbaum 於 2023 年 8 月 28 日創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州西棕櫚灘。

info.description: TAT Technologies Ltd. provides a variety of services and products to the commercial and military aerospace and ground defense industries. It operates through the following business segments: Original Equipment Manufacturing (OEM) of Heat Transfer Solutions & Aviation Accessories; Maintenance, Repair & Overhaul Services (MRO) Services for Heat Transfer Components & OEM of Heat Transfer Solutions; MRO Services for Aviation Components; and Overhaul and Coating of Jet Engine Components. The OME of Heat Transfer Solutions & Aviation Accessories segment include the design, development and manufacture of broad range of heat transfer solutions, such as pre-coolers heat exchangers and oil/fuel hydraulic heat exchangers, used in mechanical and electronic systems on board commercial, military and business aircraft; environmental control and power electronics cooling systems installed on board aircraft in and ground applications; and a variety of other mechanical aircraft accessories and systems such as pumps, valves, and turbine power units. The MRO Services for Heat Transfer Components & OEM of Heat Transfer Solutions segment include the MRO of heat transfer components and to a lesser extent, the manufacturing of certain heat transfer solutions. The MRO Services for Aviation Components segment includes the MRO of APUs, landing gears and other aircraft components. The Overhaul and Coating of Jet Engine Components segment includes the overhaul and coating of jet engine components, including turbine vanes and blades, fan blades, variable inlet guide vanes and afterburner flaps. The company was founded in April 1985 and is headquartered in Netanya, Israel.
info.description_zh: TAT Technologies Ltd. 為商業和軍事航空航天以及地面防禦行業提供各種服務和產品。它透過以下業務部門運作：傳熱解決方案和航空配件的原始設備製造（OEM）；傳熱組件的維護、維修和大修服務 (MRO) 服務以及傳熱解決方案的 OEM；航空零件的 MRO 服務；噴射引擎零件的檢修和塗層。傳熱解決方案和航空配件的 OME 部門包括設計、開發和製造廣泛的傳熱解決方案，例如預冷器熱交換器和油/燃料液壓熱交換器，用於商用、軍用和公務飛機上的機械和電子系統；安裝在飛機上和地面應用中的環境控制和電力電子冷卻系統；以及各種其他機械飛機配件和渦輪系統，例如機械機門和渦輪系統，例如機械機門和渦輪系統，例如機械機門和渦輪系統，例如機械機門和渦輪系統，例如機械機門和渦輪系統，例如機械機門和渦輪系統，例如機械機門和渦輪系統，例如機械機門和渦輪系統，例如機械機門和渦輪系統，例如機械機門和渦輪機系統，例如傳熱組件的 MRO 服務和傳熱解決方案的 OEM 部門包括傳熱組件的 MRO 以及較小程度的某些傳熱解決方案的製造。航空零件MRO服務部門包括APU、起落架和其他飛機零件的MRO。噴射發動機部件的大修和塗層部門包括噴射發動機部件的大修和塗層，包括渦輪靜葉和葉片、風扇葉片、可變入口導葉和加力燃燒室襟翼。該公司成立於1985年4月，總部位於以色列內坦亞。

info.description: Vanguard International Dividend Appreciation Index Fund ETF Shares seeks to track the performance of S&P Global Ex-U.S. Dividend Growers Index that measures the investment return of non-U.S. companies that have a history of increasing dividends. The index focuses on high-quality companies located in developed and emerging markets, excluding the U.S., that have both the ability and the commitment to grow their dividends over time. The manager attempts to replicate the target index by investing all, or substantially all, of its assets in the collection of securities that make up the index, holding each stock in approximately the same proportion as its weighting in the index.
info.description_zh: Vanguard International Dividend Appreciation Index Fund ETF Shares 旨在追蹤 S&P Global Ex-U.S. 的表現股息成長指數衡量具有增加股息歷史的非美國公司的投資回報。該指數重點關注已開發市場和新興市場（美國除外）的優質公司，這些公司有能力也有承諾隨著時間的推移增加股息。經理人試圖透過將其全部或幾乎全部資產投資於構成指數的證券集合來複製目標指數，並以與其在指數中的權重大致相同的比例持有每隻股票。

info.description: Eureka Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, shares exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on June 13, 2023 and is headquartered in Hong Kong.
info.description_zh: Eureka Acquisition Corp. 是一家空白支票公司。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2023年6月13日，總部位於香港。

info.description: Calisa Acquisition Corp. operates as a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on March 11, 2024 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Calisa Acquisition Corp. 作為一家空白支票公司運作。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股本交換、資產收購、股票購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2024年3月11日，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: Silicon Valley Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on July 21, 2025 and is headquartered in Palo Alto, CA.
info.description_zh: Silicon Valley Acquisition Corp.是一家空白支票公司。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於 2025 年 7 月 21 日，總部位於加州帕洛阿爾托。

info.description: ServiceNow, Inc. engages in the provision of an end-to-end workflow automation platform for digital businesses. Its Now Platform is a cloud-based solution embedded with artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML). The company was founded by Frederic B. Luddy in June 2004 and is headquartered in Santa Clara, CA.
info.description_zh: ServiceNow, Inc. 致力於為數位企業提供端到端工作流程自動化平台。其 Now 平台是一個基於雲端的解決方案，嵌入了人工智慧 (AI) 和機器學習 (ML)。該公司由 Frederic B. Luddy 於 2004 年 6 月創立，總部位於加州聖克拉拉。

info.description: Chicago Atlantic BDC, Inc. operates as a closed-end, non-diversified management investment company. The company invests across the cannabis ecosystem through investments in the form of direct loans and equity ownership of privately held cannabis companies. The company was founded on January 25, 2021 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: 芝加哥大西洋 BDC, Inc. 作為一家封閉式、非多元化的管理投資公司運作。該公司透過直接貸款和私人大麻公司股權形式的投資來投資整個大麻生態系統。該公司成立於2021年1月25日，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: Black Hawk Acquisition Corp. operates as a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on September 28, 2023 and is headquartered in Danville, CA.
info.description_zh: Black Hawk Acquisition Corp. 作為一家空白支票公司運營。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2023年9月28日，總部位於加州丹維爾。

info.description: Altria Group, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the manufacture and sale of cigarettes in the United States. It operates through the following segments: Smokeable Products, Oral Tobacco Products, and All Other. The Smokeable Products segment consists of cigarettes manufactured and sold by PM USA, and machine-made large cigars and pipe tobacco manufactured and sold by Middleton. The Oral Tobacco Products segment includes MST and snus products manufactured and sold by USSTC, and oral nicotine pouches manufactured and sold by Helix. The All Other segment refers to the financial results of NJOY, Helix ROW, and the IQOS System heated tobacco business. The company was founded in 1919 and is headquartered in Richmond, VA.
info.description_zh: 奧馳亞集團有限公司是一家控股公司，在美國從事捲菸的製造和銷售。它透過以下部門運作：吸煙產品、口服菸草產品和所有其他部門。可吸菸產品部門包括 PM USA 生產和銷售的捲菸以及 Middleton 生產和銷售的機制大雪茄和鬥煙。口服菸草產品部門包括 USSTC 生產和銷售的 MST 和鼻煙產品，以及 Helix 生產和銷售的口服尼古丁袋。所有其他部門是指 NJOY、Helix ROW 和 IQOS 系統加熱菸草業務的財務表現。該公司成立於 1919 年，總部位於維吉尼亞州里士滿。

info.description: GraniteShares 2x Long NOW Daily ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 2 times (200%) the daily percentage change of the common stock of ServiceNow, Inc. The fund is an actively managed exchange traded fund that attempts to replicate 2 times (200%) the daily percentage change the underlying stock by entering into financial instruments such as swaps and options on the underlying stock as well as directly purchasing the underlying stock. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: GraniteShares 2x Long NOW Daily ETF 尋求未計費用和開支之前的每日投資結果，為 ServiceNow, Inc. 普通股每日百分比變化的 2 倍 (200%)。該基金是一檔主動管理的交易所交易基金，試圖透過簽訂標的股票掉期和選擇權等金融工具以及直接購買標的股票來複製標的股票每日百分比變化的 2 倍 (200%)。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: AbbVie, Inc. is a research-based biopharmaceutical company, which engages in the development and sale of pharmaceutical products. It focuses on treating conditions such as chronic autoimmune diseases in rheumatology, gastroenterology, and dermatology, oncology, including blood cancers, virology, hepatitis C virus (HCV) and human immunodeficiency virus (HIV), neurological disorders, such as Parkinson's, metabolic, comprising thyroid disease and complications associated with cystic fibrosis, pain associated with endometriosis, and other serious health conditions. The company was founded on October 19, 2011 and is headquartered in North Chicago, IL.
info.description_zh: 艾伯維公司是一家以研究為基礎的生物製藥公司，從事藥品的開發和銷售。它專注於治療風濕病、胃腸病和皮膚病等慢性自體免疫疾病、腫瘤學（包括血癌）、病毒學、丙型肝炎病毒（HCV）和人類免疫缺陷病毒（HIV）、神經系統疾病（如帕金森氏症）、代謝性疾病（包括甲狀腺疾病和囊性纖維化相關併發症）、子宮內膜異位症相關疼痛以及其他嚴重健康狀況。該公司成立於2011年10月19日，總部位於伊利諾州北芝加哥。

info.description: ProFrac Holding Corp. engages in the provision of hydraulic fracturing, proppant production, and other completion services. It operates through the following segments: Stimulation Services, Proppant Production, Manufacturing, and Other. The Stimulation Services segment owns a fleet of mobile hydraulic fracturing units and other auxiliary equipment that generates revenue by providing stimulation services to customers. The Proppant Production segment focuses on the provision of proppant to oilfield service providers and exploration and production companies. The Manufacturing segment is involved in the sale of products such as horsepower pumps, valves, piping, swivels, large-bore manifold systems, and fluid ends. The Other segment refers to Flotek Industries and Livewire Power, LLC. The company was founded in 2016 and is headquartered in Willow Park, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣設備與服務
info.description_zh: ProFrac Holding Corp. 從事提供水力壓裂、支撐劑生產和其他完井服務。它透過以下部門運作：增產服務部門、支撐劑生產部門、製造部門和其他部門。增產服務部門擁有一批行動水力壓裂裝置和其他輔助設備，透過向客戶提供增產服務來創造收入。支撐劑生產部門專注於向油田服務提供者以及勘探和生產公司提供支撐劑。製造部門從事馬力幫浦、閥門、管路、旋轉接頭、大口徑歧管系統和流體端等產品的銷售。其他部門是指 Flotek Industries 和 Livewire Power, LLC。該公司成立於 2016 年，總部位於德克薩斯州威洛帕克。

info.description: Casella Waste Systems, Inc. engages in the provision of solid waste management services. It operates through the following segments: Eastern, Western, Mid-Atlantic, and Resource Solutions. The Eastern segment involves the operation of landfills located in Bethlehem, New Hampshire, and West Old Town, Maine. The Western region segment includes the management of landfills in Vermont and New York. The Mid-Atlantic consists of collection facilities and transfer station facility. The Resource Solutions segment focuses on the provision of materials processing, industrial recycling, organics, and resource management service. The company was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Rutland, VT.
info.description_zh: Casella Waste Systems, Inc. 從事提供固體廢棄物管理服務。它透過以下部門運作：東部、西部、大西洋中部和資源解決方案部門。東段涉及位於新罕布夏州伯利恆和緬因州西老城區的垃圾掩埋場的運作。西部地區部門包括佛蒙特州和紐約州垃圾掩埋場的管理。大西洋中部由收集設施和中轉站設施組成。資源解決方案部門專注於提供材料加工、工業回收、有機物和資源管理服務。該公司成立於 1975 年，總部位於佛蒙特州拉特蘭。

info.description: EOG Resources, Inc. engages in the exploration, development, production and marketing of crude oil and natural gas. It operates through the United States, Trinidad, and Other International geographical segments. The Other International segment includes China and Canada operations. The company was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣勘探與生產
info.description_zh: EOG Resources, Inc.從事原油和天然氣的勘探、開發、生產和行銷。它透過美國、特立尼達和其他國際地理部門開展業務。其他國際部門包括中國和加拿大業務。該公司成立於 1985 年，總部位於德克薩斯州休士頓。

info.description: Exxon Mobil Corp. engages in the exploration, development, and distribution of oil, gas, and petroleum products. It operates through the following segments: Upstream, Energy Products, Chemical Products, and Specialty Products. The Upstream segment organizes the exploration of crude oil and natural gas. The Energy Products segment includes fuels, aromatics, and catalyst and licensing. The Chemical Products segment offers petrochemicals. The Specialty Products segment provides finished lubricants, basestocks and waxes, synthetics, and elastomers and resins. The company was founded by John D. Rockefeller in 1882 and is headquartered in Spring, TX.
info.description_zh: 埃克森美孚公司從事石油、天然氣和石油產品的勘探、開發和分銷。它透過以下部門運作：上游部門、能源產品部門、化學產品部門和特殊產品部門。上游部門組織原油和天然氣的勘探。能源產品部門包括燃料、芳烴、催化劑和許可。化學產品部門提供石化產品。特種產品部門提供成品潤滑劑、基礎油和蠟、合成材料、彈性體和樹脂。該公司由約翰·D·洛克菲勒 (John D. Rockefeller) 於 1882 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州斯普林。

info.description: Republic Services, Inc. engages in the provision of environmental services. It operates through the following segments: Group 1, Group 2, and Group 3. The Group 1 segment focuses on the business of recycling and solid waste in geographic areas located in western United States. The Group 2 segment includes the recycling and solid waste business in geographic areas located in the southeastern and mid-western and the eastern seaboard of the United States. The Group 3 segment includes environmental solutions business in geographic areas located across the United States and Canada. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Phoenix, AZ.
info.description_zh: Republic Services, Inc. 從事提供環境服務。該公司透過以下部門運作：第 1 組、第 2 組和第 3 組。第 1 組部門專注於美國西部地理區域的回收和固體廢棄物業務。第二組部門包括位於美國東南部、中西部和東海岸地理區域的回收和固體廢物業務。第三組部門包括位於美國和加拿大地理區域的環境解決方案業務。該公司成立於 1996 年，總部位於亞利桑那州鳳凰城。

info.description: Dogwood Therapeutics, Inc. is a development-stage biotechnology company, which engages in developing therapeutics for pain and fatigue illness. Its product includes Halneuron. It focuses on antiviral therapies IMC-1 and IMC-2 to treat diseases associated with a viral triggered abnormal immune response such as Long-COVID and fibromyalgia. The company was founded on February 28, 2012 is headquartered in Alpharetta, GA.
info.description_zh: Dogwood Therapeutics, Inc. 是一家處於開發階段的生物技術公司，致力於開發疼痛和疲勞疾病的治療方法。其產品包括Halneuron。它專注於抗病毒療法 IMC-1 和 IMC-2，以治療與病毒引發的異常免疫反應相關的疾病，例如長新冠病毒和纖維肌痛。該公司成立於2012年2月28日，總部位於喬治亞州阿爾法利塔。

info.description: Halliburton Co. engages in the provision of products and services to the energy industry. It operates through the Completion and Production, and Drilling and Evaluation segments. The Completion and Production segment focuses on cementing, stimulation, specialty chemicals, intervention, pressure control, artificial lift, and completion products and services. The Drilling and Evaluation segment provides field and reservoir modeling, drilling, fluids, evaluation, and wellbore placement solutions that enable customers to model, measure, drill, and optimize well construction activities. The company was founded by Erle P. Halliburton in 1919 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣設備與服務
info.description_zh: 哈里伯頓公司從事為能源產業提供產品和服務。它透過完井和生產以及鑽井和評估部門運作。完井和生產部門專注於固井、增產、特殊化學品、幹預、壓力控制、人工舉升以及完井產品和服務。鑽井和評估部門提供現場和油藏建模、鑽井、流體、評估和井眼佈置解決方案，使客戶能夠建模、測量、鑽井和優化建井活動。該公司由 Erle P. Halliburton 於 1919 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州休斯頓。

info.description: Portfolio Building Block Integrated Oil And Gas And Exploration And Production Index ETF seeks to track the performance, before fees and expenses, of the BITA Global Oil & Gas Select Index. The fund uses a "passive management" approach to track the performance, before fees and expenses, of the index. The index is constructed using a rules-based methodology that identifies companies in the upstream segment of the oil and gas industry value chain with publicly traded ordinary shares listed on major stock exchanges in developed markets, as classified by BITA GmbH. Under normal circumstances, the fund will invest at least 80% of the fund's net assets in component securities that make up the index. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 投資組合建構模組綜合石油和天然氣及勘探和生產指數 ETF 旨在追蹤 BITA 全球石油和天然氣精選指數（未計費用和開支）的表現。該基金採用「被動管理」方法來追蹤該指數未計費用和開支之前的表現。該指數採用基於規則的方法構建，該方法識別石油和天然氣行業價值鏈上游部分、在已開發市場主要證券交易所上市的公開交易普通股的公司（按 BITA GmbH 的分類）。一般情況下，基金將至少80%的基金淨資產投資於構成指數的成分證券。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Berkshire Hathaway, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of property and casualty insurance and reinsurance, utilities and energy, freight rail transportation, finance, manufacturing, and retailing services. It operates through the following segments: Insurance, Burlington Northern Santa Fe, LLC (BNSF), Berkshire Hathaway Energy (BHE), Pilot Travel Centers (PTC), Manufacturing, McLane, and Service and Retailing. The Insurance segment includes the underwriting of GEICO, Berkshire Hathaway Primary Group, and Berkshire Hathaway Reinsurance Group. The BNSF segment involves the operation of railroad systems. The BHE segment focuses on regulated electric and gas utility, power generation and distribution, and real estate brokerage activities. The PTC segment consists of managing travel centers and marketing of wholesale fuel. The Manufacturing segment refers to industrial, consumer and building products, home building, and related financial services. The McLane segment covers the wholesale distribution of groceries and non-food items. The Service and Retailing segment relates to the provision of shared aircraft ownership programs, aviation pilot training, electronic components distribution, retailing businesses, automobile dealerships and trailer, and furniture leasing services. The company was founded by Oliver Chace in 1839 and is headquartered in Omaha, NE.
info.description_zh: 波克夏海瑟威公司是一家控股公司，從事提供財產和傷亡保險及再保險、公用事業和能源、鐵路貨運、金融、製造和零售服務。該公司透過以下部門營運：保險部門、Burlington Northern Santa Fe, LLC (BNSF)、伯克希爾哈撒韋能源部門 (BHE)、Pilot Travel Centers (PTC)、製造部門、McLane 部門以及服務和零售部門。保險部門包括 GEICO、Berkshire Hathaway Primary Group 和 Berkshire Hathaway Reinsurance Group 的承保業務。 BNSF 部門涉及鐵路系統的運作。 BHE 部門專注於受監管的電力和燃氣公用事業、發電和配電以及房地產經紀活動。 PTC 部門包括管理旅遊中心和批發燃料行銷。製造業涉及工業、消費品和建築產品、住宅建築以及相關金融服務。 McLane 部門涵蓋雜貨和非食品的批發分銷。服務和零售部門涉及提供共享飛機所有權計劃、航空飛行員培訓、電子元件分銷、零售業務、汽車經銷商和拖車以及家具租賃服務。該公司由 Oliver Chace 於 1839 年創立，總部位於內布拉斯加州奧馬哈。

info.description: Anbio Biotechnology is a medical device company. It is focused on developing and manufacturing a range of in-vitro diagnostic (IVD) products. The company was founded on July 27, 2021 and is headquartered in Frankfurt, Germany.
info.description_zh: 安博生物科技是一家醫療器材公司。它專注於開發和製造一系列體外診斷（IVD）產品。該公司成立於2021年7月27日，總部位於德國法蘭克福。

info.description: Valero Energy Corp. engages in the manufacture and marketing of transportation fuels and other petrochemical products. It operates through the following business segments: Refining, Ethanol and Renewable Diesel. The Refining segment consists of refining operations, associated marketing activities, and logistics assets that support its refining operations. The Ethanol segment includes its ethanol operations, associated marketing activities, and logistics assets that support its ethanol operations. The Renewable Diesel covers the operations of Diamond Green Diesel Holdings LLC. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in San Antonio, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油與天然氣精煉與行銷
info.description_zh: Valero Energy Corp. 從事運輸燃料和其他石化產品的製造和行銷。它透過以下業務部門運作：煉油、乙醇和再生柴油。煉油部門包括煉油業務、相關行銷活動以及支援煉油業務的物流資產。乙醇部門包括其乙醇業務、相關行銷活動以及支持其乙醇業務的物流資產。再生柴油涵蓋 Diamond Green Diesel Holdings LLC 的營運。該公司成立於 1980 年，總部位於德克薩斯州聖安東尼奧。

info.description: Tower Semiconductor Ltd. engages in providing semiconductor solutions. It also offers technology and manufacturing platforms for integrated circuits (ICs) in growing markets such as consumer, industrial, automotive, mobile, infrastructure, medical, and aerospace and defense. It focuses on creating positive and sustainable impact on the world through long term partnerships and its advanced and innovative analog technology offering, comprised of a broad range of customizable process platforms such as SiGe, BiCMOS, mixed-signal/CMOS, RF CMOS, CMOS image sensor, non-imaging sensors, integrated power management (BCD and 700V), and MEMS. Its designs enable a quick and accurate design cycle as well as process transfer services including development, transfer, and optimization, to IDMs and fabless companies. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Migdal Haemek, Israel.
info.description_zh: Tower Semiconductor Ltd. 致力於提供半導體解決方案。它還為消費、工業、汽車、移動、基礎設施、醫療、航空航太和國防等不斷增長的市場中的積體電路 (IC) 提供技術和製造平台。它專注於透過長期合作夥伴關係及其先進和創新的類比技術產品對世界產生積極和可持續的影響，該技術產品由廣泛的可自訂製程平台組成，例如 SiGe、BiCMOS、混合訊號/CMOS、RF CMOS、CMOS 影像感測器、非影像感測器、整合電源管理（BCD 和 700V）和 MEMS。其設計為 IDM 和無晶圓廠公司提供快速、準確的設計週期以及包括開發、轉移和優化在內的流程轉移服務。該公司成立於1993年，總部位於以色列Migdal Haemek。

info.description: Ford Motor Co. engages in the manufacture, distribution, and sale of automobiles. It operates through the following segments: Ford Blue, Ford Model E, Ford Pro, Ford Credit, and Corporate Other. The Ford Blue, Ford Model E, and Ford Pro segment includes the sale of Ford and Lincoln vehicles, service parts, and accessories, together with the associated costs to develop, manufacture, distribute, and service the vehicles, parts, and accessories. The Ford Credit segment consists of the Ford Credit business on a consolidated basis, which is primarily vehicle-related financing and leasing activities. The Corporate Other segment refers to corporate governance expenses, past service pension and OPEB income and expense, interest income and gains and losses from cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities, and foreign exchange derivatives gains, and losses associated with intercompany lending. The company was founded by Henry Ford on June 16, 1903 and is headquartered in Dearborn, MI.
info.description_zh: 福特汽車公司從事汽車的製造、分銷和銷售。該公司透過以下部門營運：Ford Blue、Ford Model E、Ford Pro、Ford Credit 和 Corporate Other。福特 Blue、福特 Model E 和福特 Pro 部門包括福特和林肯車輛、維修零件和配件的銷售，以及開發、製造、分銷和維修車輛、零件和配件的相關成本。福特信貸部門由合併後的福特信貸業務組成，主要從事與車輛相關的融資和租賃活動。公司其他部分是指公司治理費用、過去的服務退休金和 OPEB 收入和費用、利息收入以及現金、現金等價物和有價證券的損益，以及外匯衍生性商品收益以及與公司間借貸相關的損失。該公司由亨利福特於 1903 年 6 月 16 日創立，總部位於密西根州迪爾伯恩。

info.description: The Kroger Co. engages in the retail grocery business with added convenience to retail pharmacies and fuel centers. Its main focus is on growing households and increasing customer loyalty by delivering great value and convenience, and investing in four strategic pillars: Fresh, Brands, Data & Personalization and Seamless. Its brands include Big K, Smart Way, Heritage Farm, Simple Truth, and Simple Truth Organic. The company was founded by Barney Kroger in 1883 and is headquartered in Cincinnati, OH.
info.description_zh: 克羅格公司從事零售雜貨業務，為零售藥局和加油中心提供更多便利。其主要重點是透過提供巨大的價值和便利性來增加家庭數量並提高客戶忠誠度，並投資於四個策略支柱：新鮮度、品牌、數據和個人化以及無縫。其品牌包括 Big K、Smart Way、Heritage Farm、Simple Truth 和 Simple Truth Organic。該公司由 Barney Kroger 於 1883 年創立，總部位於俄亥俄州辛辛那提。

info.description: Direxion Daily BRKB Bull 2X Shares seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 200% of the daily performance of BRK/B. The fund, under normal circumstances, invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in the securities of BRK/B and financial instruments, such as swap agreements and options, that, in combination, provide 2X daily leveraged exposure to BRK/B, consistent with the fund's investment objective. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Direxion Daily BRKB Bull 2X Shares 尋求每日投資結果（未計費用和開支）為 BRK/B 每日表現的 200%。在正常情況下，該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款）投資於 BRK/B 證券以及掉期協議和期權等金融工具，這些金融工具結合起來為 BRK/B 提供 2 倍的每日槓桿敞口，這與基金的投資目標一致。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Chevron Corp. engages in the provision of oil and gas energy solutions. It provides crude oil and natural gas, manufactures transportation fuels, lubricants, petrochemicals, and additives, and develops technologies that enhance business and the industry. It operates through the Upstream and Downstream segments. The Upstream segment consists of the exploration, development, and production of crude oil and natural gas, the liquefaction, transportation, and regasification associated with liquefied natural gas, the transporting of crude oil by major international oil export pipelines, the processing, transporting, storage, and marketing of natural gas, and a gas-to-liquids plant. The Downstream segment consists of the refining of crude oil into petroleum products, the marketing of crude oil and refined products, the transporting of crude oil and refined products by pipeline, marine vessel, motor equipment, and rail car, and the manufacturing and marketing of commodity petrochemicals and plastics for industrial uses and fuel & lubricant additives. The company was founded on September 10, 1879 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.description_zh: 雪佛龍公司從事提供石油和天然氣能源解決方案。它提供原油和天然氣，生產運輸燃料、潤滑油、石化產品和添加劑，並開發增強業務和產業的技術。它透過上游和下游部分運作。上游部門包括原油和天然氣的勘探、開發和生產，與液化天然氣相關的液化、運輸和再氣化，透過主要國際石油出口管道運輸原油，天然氣的加工、運輸、儲存和行銷以及天然氣液化工廠。下游部門包括將原油精煉成石油產品，原油和成品油的營銷，透過管道、船舶、電機設備和軌道車運輸原油和成品油，以及工業用大宗石化產品和塑膠以及燃料和潤滑油添加劑的製造和行銷。該公司成立於 1879 年 9 月 10 日，總部位於德克薩斯州休斯頓。

info.description: Occidental Petroleum Corp. engages in the exploration and production of oil and natural gas. It operates through the following segments: Oil and Gas, Chemical, and Midstream and Marketing. The Oil and Gas segment explores for, develops and produces oil and condensate, natural gas liquids, and natural gas. The Chemical segment manufactures and markets basic chemicals and vinyls. The Midstream and Marketing segment purchases, markets, gathers, processes, transports and stores oil, condensate, natural gas liquids, natural gas, carbon dioxide, and power. The company was founded in 1920 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣勘探與生產
info.description_zh: 西方石油公司從事石油和天然氣的勘探和生產。它透過以下部門運作：石油和天然氣部門、化學部門、中游部門和行銷部門。石油和天然氣部門勘探、開發和生產石油和凝析油、液化天然氣和天然氣。化學部門生產和銷售基本化學品和乙烯基。中游和行銷部門購買、行銷、收集、加工、運輸和儲存石油、凝析油、液化天然氣、天然氣、二氧化碳和電力。該公司成立於 1920 年，總部位於德克薩斯州休士頓。

info.description: Dorchester Minerals LP engages in the acquisition, ownership, and administration of royalty properties and net profits interests (NPI). The NPI represents a net profits overriding royalty interest burdening various properties owned by its operating partnership. Royalty properties consist of producing and nonproducing mineral, royalty, overriding royalty, net profits, and leasehold interests. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Dallas, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣勘探與生產
info.description_zh: Dorchester Minerals LP 從事特許權使用費和淨利潤權益 (NPI) 的收購、所有權和管理業務。 NPI 代表淨利潤高於其營運合夥企業擁有的各種財產的特許權使用費利息。特許權使用費財產包括生產性和非生產性礦物、特許權使用費、首要特許權使用費、淨利潤和租賃權益。該公司成立於 1982 年，總部位於德克薩斯州達拉斯。

info.description: Regis Corp. engages in the provision of ownership, franchise, and operation of beauty salons. It operates through the Company-Owned Salons and Franchise Salons segments. It also sells hair care and other beauty products. Its brands include Supercuts, SmartStyle Hair Salon, Cost Cutters, First Choice Haircutters, Roosters, Opensalon, and Best Cuts. The company was founded by Paul Kunin and Florence Kunin in 1922 and is headquartered in Minneapolis, MN.
info.description_zh: Regis Corp. 從事提供美容院的所有權、特許經營權和經營業務。它透過公司自有沙龍和特許經營沙龍部門運營。它還銷售護髮和其他美容產品。其品牌包括 Supercuts、SmartStyle Hair Salon、Cost Cutters、First Choice Haircutters、Roosters、Opensalon 和 Best Cuts。該公司由 Paul Kunin 和 Florence Kunin 於 1922 年創立，總部位於明尼蘇達州明尼阿波利斯。

info.description: VEON Ltd. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of connectivity and digital services. It operates through the following geographical segments: Pakistan, Ukraine, Kazakhstan, Uzbekistan, and Bangladesh. Additionally, the company reports its operations under Other, which includes activities in Kyrgyzstan, and HQ and eliminations, which covers management-related transactions. The company was founded by Dmitriy Borisovich Zimin and Augie K. Fabela II in 1992 and is headquartered in Dubai, United Arab Emirates.
info.description_zh: VEON Ltd.是一家控股公司，從事提供連接和數位服務。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：巴基斯坦、烏克蘭、哈薩克、烏茲別克和孟加拉。此外，該公司在「其他」項下報告其業務，其中包括在吉爾吉斯斯坦的活動，以及總部和抵銷，其中包括與管理相關的交易。該公司由 Dmitriy Borisovich Zimin 和 Augie K. Fabela II 於 1992 年創立，總部位於阿拉伯聯合大公國杜拜。

info.description: Lesaka Technologies, Inc. is a South African financial technology company, which engages in proprietary banking and payment technologies. It operates through the Merchant and Consumer segments. The Merchant segment includes activities related to the provision of goods and services provided to corporate and other juristic entities. The Consumer segment focuses on activities related to the provision of financial services to customers, including bank accounts, loans, and insurance products. The company was founded by Serge Christian Pierre Belamant in 1989 and is headquartered in Johannesburg, South Africa.
info.description_zh: Lesaka Technologies, Inc.是一家南非金融科技公司，從事自營銀行和支付技術。它透過商家和消費者部門運作。商業部門包括與向公司和其他法人實體提供商品和服務相關的活動。消費者部門專注於與向客戶提供金融服務相關的活動，包括銀行帳戶、貸款和保險產品。該公司由 Serge Christian Pierre Belamant 於 1989 年創立，總部位於南非約翰尼斯堡。

info.description: vTv Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company engaged in the discovery and development of orally administered small molecule drug candidates to fill significant unmet medical needs. Its products target the treatment of central nervous system disorders, diabetes and metabolic disorders, inflammation, and cancer. It offers Azeliragon, TTP399, TTP273, HPP593, HPP737, and the Nrf2/Bach1 program. The company was founded on April 2, 2015 and is headquartered in High Point, NC.
info.description_zh: vTv Therapeutics, Inc. 是一家臨床階段的生物製藥公司，致力於發現和開發口服小分子候選藥物，以滿足重大未滿足的醫療需求。其產品針對中樞神經系統疾病、糖尿病和代謝紊亂、發炎和癌症的治療。它提供 Azeliragon、TTP399、TTP273、HPP593、HPP737 和 Nrf2/Bach1 程式。該公司成立於2015年4月2日，總部位於北卡羅來納州海波因特。

info.description: ProShares UltraShort Nasdaq Biotechnology seeks daily investment results that correspond to two times the inverse (-2x) of the daily performance of the Nasdaq Biotechnology Index. The fund invests in financial instruments that ProShare Advisors believes, in combination, should produce daily returns consistent with the fund's investment objective. The index is a modified capitalization weighted index that includes securities of Nasdaq listed companies that are classified as either biotechnology or pharmaceutical. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: ProShares UltraShort 納斯達克生物技術尋求相當於納斯達克生物技術指數每日表現的兩倍（-2x）的每日投資結果。該基金投資於 ProShare Advisors 認為綜合起來應產生與基金投資目標一致的每日回報的金融工具。該指數是修改後的資本加權指數，包括納斯達克上市公司的證券，這些公司被分類為生物技術或製藥。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Vertex Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a global biotechnology company, which engages in the business of discovering, developing, manufacturing, and commercializing small molecule drugs for patients with serious diseases. The firm focuses on development and commercializing therapies for the treatment of cystic fibrosis, infectious diseases including viral infections such as influenza and bacterial infections, autoimmune diseases such as rheumatoid arthritis, cancer, inflammatory bowel disease and neurological disorders including pain and multiple sclerosis. The company was founded by Joshua S. Boger in 1989 and is headquartered in Boston, MA.
info.description_zh: Vertex Pharmaceuticals, Inc.是一家全球生技公司，從事為嚴重疾病患者發現、開發、製造和商業化小分子藥物的業務。該公司專注於開發和商業化用於治療囊性纖維化、傳染病（包括流感和細菌感染等病毒感染）、自體免疫疾病（如類風濕性關節炎、癌症、發炎性腸道疾病和神經系統疾病（包括疼痛和多發性硬化症））的療法。該公司由 Joshua S. Boger 於 1989 年創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州波士頓。

info.description: GraniteShares YieldBOOST COIN ETF seeks current income; the fund's secondary investment objective is to seek exposure to the performance of one or more exchange-traded funds whose shares trade on a U.S.-regulated securities exchange and that seek daily leverage investment results of 2 times the daily percentage of the common stock of Coinbase Global, Inc. Class A subject to a limit on potential investment gains. The fund will invest at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in derivatives contracts that utilize the underlying COIN ETF as the reference asset. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: GraniteShares YieldBOOST COIN ETF 尋求當前收入；該基金的次要投資目標是尋求一隻或多只交易所交易基金的表現，這些基金的股票在美國監管的證券交易所進行交易，並尋求每日槓桿投資結果為 Coinbase Global, Inc. A 類普通股每日百分比的 2 倍，但受到潛在投資收益的限制。該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款）投資於利用基礎 COIN ETF 作為參考資產的衍生性合約。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: iShares MSCI China ETF seeks to track the investment results of the MSCI China Index. The fund generally will invest at least 80% of its assets in the component securities of the underlying index and in investments that have economic characteristics that are substantially identical to the component securities of the underlying index. The index is a free float-adjusted market capitalization-weighted index that is designed to measure the performance of equity securities in the top 85% in market capitalization of the Chinese equity securities markets, as represented by the H-shares and B-shares markets. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: iShares MSCI 中國 ETF 旨在追蹤 MSCI 中國指數的投資結果。該基金通常將至少 80% 的資產投資於標的指數的組成證券以及具有與標的指數的組成證券基本相同的經濟特徵的投資。該指數是自由流通量調整後的市值加權指數，旨在衡量以H股和B股市場為代表的中國權益類證券市場市值排名前85%的權益類證券的表現。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Organogenesis Holdings, Inc. is a regenerative medical company, which engages in the development, manufacture, and commercialization of product solutions for the advanced wound care, surgical and sports medicine markets. The company was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Canton, MA.
info.industry_zh: 藥品製造商 - 特用藥品和非專利藥品
info.description_zh: Organogenesis Holdings, Inc.是一家再生醫療公司，致力於為先進傷口護理、外科和運動醫學市場開發、製造和商業化產品解決方案。該公司成立於 1985 年，總部位於馬薩諸塞州坎頓。

info.description: Roma Green Finance Ltd. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of environmental, social and governance, sustainability, and climate change related advisory services through its subsidiaries. Its services include corporate and risk advisory, sustainability strategy services, climate risk advisory, ESG reporting services, and sustainable finance. The company was founded in 2018 and is headquartered in Hong Kong.
info.description_zh: Roma Green Finance Ltd.是一家控股公司，透過其子公司提供環境、社會和治理、永續發展以及氣候變遷相關的諮詢服務。其服務包括企業和風險諮詢、永續發展策略服務、氣候風險諮詢、ESG報告服務和永續金融。公司成立於2018年，總部位於香港。

info.description: Versant Media Group, Inc. operates as an industry media and entertainment business that operates in four core markets: political news and opinion, business news and personal finance, golf and athletics participation and sports and genre entertainment. It also serves on markets primarily through a strong portfolio of brands consisting of renowned networks and complementary digital platforms. The company was founded on May 1, 2025 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Versant Media Group, Inc. 是一家行業媒體和娛樂企業，業務涉及四個核心市場：政治新聞和輿論、商業新聞和個人理財、高爾夫和田徑參與以及體育和流派娛樂。它也主要透過由知名網路和互補數位平台組成的強大品牌組合在市場上提供服務。該公司成立於2025年5月1日，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: Tuttle Capital Daily 2X Inverse Regional Banks ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 200% of the inverse (or opposite) of the daily performance of the KRE ETF. The fund, under normal circumstances, invests in swap agreements that provide 200% inverse (opposite) daily exposure to TSLA equal to at least 80% of the fund's net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes ). The fund advisor seeks daily leveraged inverse investment results and the fund is very different from most other exchange-traded funds and presents different and greater risks. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Tuttle Capital Daily 2X Inverse Regional Banks ETF 尋求每日投資結果（未計費用和開支）為 KRE ETF 每日表現的 200% 倒數（或相反）。在正常情況下，該基金投資於掉期協議，該協議提供 200% 的 TSLA 每日反向（相反）敞口，相當於該基金淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款）的至少 80%。基金顧問尋求每日槓桿反向投資結果，該基金與大多數其他交易所交易基金有很大不同，並呈現不同且更大的風險。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Invesco Golden Dragon China ETF seeks to track the investment results (before fees and expenses) of the NASDAQ Golden Dragon China Index. The fund generally will invest at least 90% of its total assets in the securities that comprise the underlying index. The underlying index is composed of securities of U.S. exchange-listed companies that are headquartered or incorporated in the People's Republic of China. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 景順金龍中國ETF旨在追蹤納斯達克金龍中國指數的投資結果（未扣除費用和開支）。該基金通常將至少 90% 的總資產投資於構成標的指數的證券。標的指數由總部或在中華人民共和國註冊成立的美國交易所上市公司的證券組成。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Interactive Strength, Inc. engages in the development and sale of an at-home fitness technology platform. It offers Forme, a digital fitness service that combines fitness hardware products with personal training and coaching services. It operates under the following geographical segments: the United States, the United Kingdom, and Taiwan. The company was founded by Trent A. Ward and Ben Bartlett on May 8, 2017 and is headquartered in Austin, TX.
info.description_zh: Interactive Strength, Inc. 從事家庭健身技術平台的開發與銷售。它提供 Forme，一種數位健身服務，將健身硬體產品與個人訓練和輔導服務結合。它在以下地理區域運作：美國、英國和台灣。該公司由 Trent A. Ward 和 Ben Bartlett 於 2017 年 5 月 8 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州奧斯汀。

info.description: Nextpower, Inc. engages in the provision of integrated solar tracker and software solutions used in utility-scale and ground-mounted distributed generation solar projects. Its products enable solar panels in utility-scale power plants to follow the sun's movement across the sky and optimize plant performance. The company was founded by Daniel S. Shugar, Alexander Au, Nicholas Miller, Michael Mehavich, Marco Garcia, and Tyroan Hardy in 2013 and is headquartered in Fremont, CA.
info.description_zh: Nextpower, Inc. 致力於提供用於公用事業規模和地面分散式發電太陽能專案的整合式太陽能追蹤器和軟體解決方案。其產品使公用事業規模發電廠中的太陽能電池板能夠跟隨太陽在天空中的運動並優化發電廠性能。該公司由 Daniel S. Shugar、Alexander Au、Nicholas Miller、Michael Mehavich、Marco Garcia 和 Tyroan Hardy 於 2013 年創立，總部位於加州弗里蒙特。

info.description: Phunware, Inc. engages in the development of a Multiscreen-as-a-Service platform, an enterprise cloud platform for mobile devices. It provides companies the products, solutions, data, and services necessary to engage, manage, and monetize mobile application portfolios and audiences at scale. Its platform also allows for the licensing and creation of category-defining mobile experiences for brands and their application users worldwide. The company was founded by Alan S. Knitowski and Luan Dang in February 2009 and is headquartered in Austin, TX.
info.description_zh: Phunware, Inc. 從事多螢幕即服務平台的開發，這是一個針對行動裝置的企業雲端平台。它為公司提供大規模吸引、管理行動應用程式組合和受眾並從中獲利所需的產品、解決方案、數據和服務。其平台還允許為全球品牌及其應用程式用戶許可和創建類別定義的行動體驗。該公司由 Alan S. Knitowski 和 Luan Dang 於 2009 年 2 月創立，總部位於德克薩斯州奧斯汀。

info.description: TOYO Co. Ltd. engages in the design, manufacture, and sale of solar cells and modules. It is involved in integrating the upstream production of wafer and silicon, midstream production of solar cell, downstream production of photovoltaic (PV) modules, and potentially other stages of the solar power supply chain. The company was founded on November 8, 2022 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
info.description_zh: TOYO Co. Ltd. 從事太陽能電池和組件的設計、製造和銷售。它涉及整合上游矽片和矽片生產、太陽能電池中游生產、光伏（PV）模組下游生產以及太陽能供應鏈的其他潛在階段。該公司成立於2022年11月8日，總部位於日本東京。

info.description: Defiance Daily Target 2X Long AVGO ETF seeks daily leveraged investment results of two times (200%) the daily percentage change in the share price of Broadcom Inc. (Nasdaq: AVGO) (the "Underlying Security" or "AVGO"). The fund is an actively managed exchange traded fund ("ETF") that attempts to achieve two times (200%) the daily percentage change in the share price of the underlying security by entering into swap agreements on the underlying security. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Defiance Daily Target 2X Long AVGO ETF 尋求每日槓桿投資結果為 Broadcom Inc.（納斯達克股票代碼：AVGO）（「基礎證券」或「AVGO」）股價每日百分比變化的兩倍 (200%)。該基金是一種主動管理的交易所交易基金（「ETF」），試圖透過簽訂基礎證券掉期協議來實現基礎證券股價每日百分比變化的兩倍（200%）。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: GraniteShares 2x Long AVGO Daily ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 2 times (200%) the daily percentage change of the common stock of Broadcom Inc. The fund is an actively managed exchange traded fund that attempts to replicate 2 times (200%) the daily percentage change the underlying stock by entering into financial instruments such as swaps and options on the underlying stock as well as directly purchasing the underlying stock. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: GraniteShares 2x Long AVGO Daily ETF 尋求未計費用和開支的每日投資結果為 Broadcom Inc. 普通股每日百分比變化的 2 倍 (200%)。該基金是一檔主動管理的交易所交易基金，試圖透過簽訂標的股票掉期和選擇權等金融工具以及直接購買標的股票來複製標的股票每日百分比變化的 2 倍 (200%)。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Direxion Daily AVGO Bull 2X Shares seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 200% of the daily performance of AVGO. The fund, under normal circumstances, invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in the securities of AVGO and financial instruments, such as swap agreements and options, that, in combination, provide 2X daily leveraged exposure to AVGO, consistent with the fund's investment objective. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Direxion Daily AVGO Bull 2X Shares 尋求每日投資結果（扣除費用和開支）為 AVGO 每日表現的 200%。在正常情況下，該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款）投資於 AVGO 證券和掉期協議和期權等金融工具，這些金融工具結合起來為 AVGO 提供 2 倍的每日槓桿敞口，這與基金的投資目標一致。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Rigel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. operates as a clinical stage biotechnology company. It discovers and develops novel, targeted drugs in the therapeutic areas of immunology, oncology and immune oncology. The firm focuses on intracellular signalling pathways and related targets that are critical to disease mechanisms. The company's products include Tavalisse, Fostamatinib and R835. Rigel Pharmaceuticals was founded by Donald G. Payan, James M. Gower, Thomas A. Raffin, Garry P. Nolan and Ronald B. Garren on June 14, 1996 and is headquartered in South San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: Rigel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. 是一家臨床階段生物技術公司。它在免疫學、腫瘤學和免疫腫瘤學治療領域發現和開發新型標靶藥物。該公司專注於對疾病機制至關重要的細胞內訊號通路和相關標靶。該公司的產品包括Tavalisse、Fostamatinib和R835。 Rigel Pharmaceuticals 由 Donald G. Payan、James M. Gower、Thomas A. Raffin、Garry P. Nolan 和 Ronald B. Garren 於 1996 年 6 月 14 日創立，總部位於加州南舊金山。

info.description: AGM Group Holdings, Inc. is a technology company, which engages in the provision of financial solutions. It focuses on the research and development of blockchain-oriented ASIC chip, production of encryption mining machines, and financial technology software services. Its products and services include technology hardware research and development, and assembling and sales of technology hardware. The company was founded by Zhen Tao Jiang and Wen Jie Tang on April 27, 2015 and is headquartered in Hong Kong.
info.description_zh: AGM Group Holdings, Inc.是一家提供金融解決方案的科技公司。專注於面向區塊鏈的ASIC晶片研發、加密礦機生產、金融科技軟體服務。其產品和服務包括技術硬體研發、技術硬體組裝和銷售。該公司由姜振濤和唐文傑於2015年4月27日創立，總部位於香港。

info.description: QuantumScape Corp. engages in developing next-generation solid-state lithium-metal batteries. The company's next-generation batteries are designed to enable greater energy density, faster charging, and enhanced safety to support the transition away from legacy energy sources toward a lower-carbon future. The company was founded by Jagdeep Singh, Tim Holme, and Fritz B. Prinz in May 2010 and is headquartered in San Jose, CA.
info.description_zh: QuantumScape Corp. 致力於開發新一代固態鋰金屬電池。該公司的下一代電池旨在實現更高的能量密度、更快的充電速度和更高的安全性，以支持從傳統能源向低碳未來的過渡。該公司由 Jagdeep Singh、Tim Holme 和 Fritz B. Prinz 於 2010 年 5 月創立，總部位於加州聖荷西。

info.description: Velo3D, Inc. operates as a technology company, which engages in developing and manufacturing metal laser sintering printing machines for 3D printing. Its products include assure system, flow software, sapphire printer & sapphire XC. The company was founded by Benyamin Buller in June 2014 and is headquartered in Fremont, CA.
info.description_zh: Velo3D, Inc.是一家科技公司，致力於開發和製造用於3D列印的金屬雷射燒結印表機。其產品包括保固系統、流程軟體、藍寶石印表機和藍寶石XC。該公司由 Benyamin Buller 於 2014 年 6 月創立，總部位於加州弗里蒙特。

info.description: Coya Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company which engages in developing proprietary medicinal products to modulate the function of regulatory T cells. The company was founded by Howard Berman in 2020 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.description_zh: Coya Therapeutics, Inc.是一家臨床階段生物技術公司，致力於開發調節調節性T細胞功能的專有醫藥產品。該公司由 Howard Berman 於 2020 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州休士頓。

info.description: Greenidge Generation Holdings, Inc. owns and operates a vertically integrated Bitcoin mining and power generation facility. It engages in the mining of Bitcoin and contributes to the security and transactability of the Bitcoin ecosystem while concurrently meeting the power needs of homes and businesses. The company was founded in 2014 and is headquartered Pittsford, NY.
info.description_zh: Error 500 (Server Error)!!1500.That’s an error.There was an error. Please try again later.That’s all we know.

info.description: Canton Strategic Holdings, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing a portfolio of therapeutic candidates for inflammation and immunology. It also develops TH104, which is known to suppress chronic, debilitating pruritus or uncontrollable itching in PBC, a rare and orphan liver disease with no known cure. The company was founded on March 28, 2017 and is headquartered in Bridgewater, NJ.
info.description_zh: Canton Strategy Holdings, Inc.是一家臨床階段生物技術公司，開發發炎和免疫學候選治療藥物組合。它還開發了 TH104，已知它可以抑制 PBC 中的慢性、衰弱性瘙癢或無法控制的瘙癢，PBC 是一種罕見的孤兒肝病，目前尚無已知的治癒方法。該公司成立於2017年3月28日，總部位於新澤西州布里奇沃特。

info.description: Ondas, Inc. engages in the development, marketing, and sale of wireless radio systems for secure, wide area mission-critical business-to-business networks. It operates through the Ondas Networks and Ondas Autonomous Systems segments. The Ondas Networks segment provides wireless connectivity solutions enabling mission-critical Industrial Internet applications and services. The Ondas Autonomous Systems segment designs, develops, and markets commercial drone solutions via the Optimus System and Scout System. The company was founded on December 22, 2014 and is headquartered in West Palm Beach, FL.
info.description_zh: Ondas, Inc. 從事安全、廣域任務關鍵型企業對企業網路的無線電系統的開發、行銷和銷售。它透過 Ondas Networks 和 Ondas Autonomous Systems 部門運作。 Ondas Networks 部門提供無線連接解決方案，支援任務關鍵型工業互聯網應用和服務。 Ondas Autonomous Systems 部門透過 Optimus System 和 Scout System 設計、開發和銷售商用無人機解決方案。該公司成立於2014年12月22日，總部位於佛羅裡達州西棕櫚灘。

info.description: AI Financial Corp. is a fintech company which engages in blockchain-powered technologies for digital asset trading, payments processing and related payment card services. It provides regulated institutional-grade Crypto-as-a-Service infrastructure for the digital asset economy. The company was founded by Edward R. Cameron in 1976 and is headquartered in Las Vegas, NV.
info.description_zh: AI Financial Corp.是一家金融科技公司，從事數位資產交易、支付處理和相關支付卡服務的區塊鏈技術。它為數位資產經濟提供受監管的機構級加密即服務基礎設施。該公司由 Edward R. Cameron 於 1976 年創立，總部位於內華達州拉斯維加斯。

info.description: 2x XRP ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, that correspond to two times (2x) the daily performance of XRP. The fund is an exchange-traded fund ("ETF") that seeks to achieve its investment objective primarily through managed exposure to XRP futures contracts that trade only on an exchange registered with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission ("XRP Futures Contracts"), and cash, cash-like instruments or high-quality securities that serve as collateral to the fund's investments in XRP Futures Contracts ("Collateral Investments"). The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 2x XRP ETF 尋求扣除費用和開支之前的每日投資結果，相當於 XRP 每日表現的兩倍 (2x)。該基金是一檔交易所交易基金（「ETF」），主要透過管理 XRP 期貨合約（僅在商品期貨交易委員會註冊的交易所交易）（「XRP 期貨合約」）以及作為基金 XRP 期貨合約投資抵押品的現金、類現金工具或高品質證券（「抵押投資」）來實現其投資目標。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: ATIF Holdings Ltd. engages in the provision of financial consulting services. It is also involved in merger and acquisition business advisory, post-listing compliance, management support, and related services. The company was founded on January 5, 2015 and is headquartered in Irvine, CA.
info.description_zh: ATIF Holdings Ltd. 從事提供財務諮詢服務。它還涉及併購業務諮詢、上市後合規、管理支援和相關服務。該公司成立於2015年1月5日，總部位於加州歐文。

info.description: Equillium, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company that engages in the development of novel therapeutics to treat severe autoimmune and inflammatory disorders with high unmet medical need. Its product pipeline includes EQ001, which is a monoclonal antibody that selectively targets the novel immune checkpoint receptor CD6. The company was founded by Daniel Mark Bradbury, Bruce D. Steel, and Stephen Connelly in March 2017 and is headquartered in La Jolla, CA.
info.description_zh: Equillium, Inc.是一家臨床階段的生物技術公司，致力於開發新型療法來治療醫療需求未滿足的嚴重自體免疫和發炎性疾病。其產品線包括EQ001，這是一種選擇性靶向新型免疫檢查點受體CD6的單株抗體。該公司由 Daniel Mark Bradbury、Bruce D. Steel 和 Stephen Connelly 於 2017 年 3 月創立，總部位於加州拉霍亞。

info.description: Kingsoft Cloud Holdings Ltd. provides cloud storage and cloud computation services. It offers cloud platform consisting of cloud infrastructure, cutting-edge cloud products and architected industry-specific solutions across public cloud, enterprise cloud and AIoT cloud services. The firm's products include computing, networking, storage & CDN, database, data analysis and security. It offers medical & healthcare solutions, supply chain finance solutions, e-government solutions, internet of vehicles solutions, media cloud solutions, big data education & training solutions, cloud integrated service and cloud gaming service. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
info.description_zh: 金山雲控股有限公司提供雲端儲存和雲端運算服務。它提供由雲端基礎設施、尖端雲產品和跨公有雲、企業雲和AIoT雲服務的特定產業解決方案組成的雲端平台。該公司的產品包括運算、網路、儲存和 CDN、資料庫、資料分析和安全性。提供醫療健康解決方案、供應鏈金融解決方案、電子化政府解決方案、車聯網解決方案、媒體雲端解決方案、大數據教育培訓解決方案、雲端綜合服務和雲端遊戲服務。公司成立於2012年，總部位於中國北京。

info.description: Optical Cable Corp. engages in the business of manufacturing fiber optic and copper data communication cabling and connectivity solutions primarily for the enterprise market and various harsh environment, specialty markets, and the wireless carrier market offering integrated suites of high-quality products which operate as a system solution or seamlessly integrate with other components. Its products include fiber optic and copper cabling, hybrid cabling, fiber optic and copper connectors, specialty fiber optic, copper and hybrid connectors, fiber optic and copper patch cords, pre-terminated fiber optic and copper cable assemblies, racks, cabinets, datacom enclosures, patch panels, face plates, multimedia boxes, fiber optic reels, and other cable and connectivity management accessories. The company was founded on June 10, 1983 and is headquartered in Roanoke, VA.
info.description_zh: Optical Cable Corp. 從事製造光纖和銅纜數據通訊佈線和連接解決方案的業務，主要針對企業市場和各種惡劣環境、專業市場和無線營運商市場，提供高品質產品的整合套件，這些產品可作為系統解決方案運作或與其他組件無縫整合。其產品包括光纖和銅纜佈線、混合佈線、光纖和銅電纜組件、機架、機櫃、數據通訊機櫃、配線架、面板、多媒體盒、光纖捲筒以及其他電纜和連接管理配件。該公司成立於 1983 年 6 月 10 日，總部位於維吉尼亞州羅阿諾克。

info.description: Youlife Group Inc. engages in the development and provision of blue-collar services through its subsidiary. It assists blue-collar talent with skill improvement and lifetime career development, through vocational education services, HR recruitment services, employee management services, and market services segments. The company was founded on February 26, 2019 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
info.description_zh: Youlife Group Inc. 透過其子公司從事藍領服務的開發和提供。透過職業教育服務、人力資源招募服務、員工管理服務、市場服務等細分領域，幫助藍領人才進行技能提升與終身職涯發展。公司成立於2019年2月26日，總部位於中國上海。

info.description: Quantum Cyber NV engages in assembling an artificial intelligence (AI)-powered, quantum-accelerated system-of-systems autonomous defense platform. It integrates drone warfare, counter-UAS, autonomous naval mine countermeasures, EMP shielding, anti-drone ammunition, command-and-control, and quantum antenna applications. The company was founded on March 8, 2021 and is headquartered in West Palm Beach, FL.
info.description_zh: Quantum Cyber​​ NV 致力於組裝由人工智慧 (AI) 驅動、量子加速的系統級系統自主防禦平台。它整合了無人機作戰、反無人機、自主水雷對抗、電磁脈衝屏蔽、反無人機彈藥、指揮控制和量子天線應用。該公司成立於 2021 年 3 月 8 日，總部位於佛羅裡達州西棕櫚灘。

info.description: HCW Biologics Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering and developing novel immunotherapies to lengthen health span by disrupting the link between chronic, low-grade inflammation, and age-related diseases. The firm considers age-related low-grade chronic inflammation as a contributing factor to several chronic diseases and conditions, such as cancer, cardiovascular disease, diabetes, neurodegenerative diseases, and autoimmune diseases. The company was founded by Hing C. Wong on April 2, 2018 and is headquartered in Miramar, FL.
info.description_zh: HCW Biologics Inc. 是一家生物製藥公司，專注於發現和開發新型免疫療法，透過破壞慢性、低度發炎和年齡相關疾病之間的關聯來延長健康壽命。該公司認為與年齡相關的低度慢性發炎是導致多種慢性疾病和病症的因素，例如癌症、心血管疾病、糖尿病、神經退化性疾病和自體免疫疾病。該公司由 Hing C. Wong 於 2018 年 4 月 2 日創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州米拉瑪。
